---
title: "HW5"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-21"
---
## California Wind Turbines Map

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(mapdata)

# Load state data and filter for California
states_data <- map_data("state")
california <- subset(states_data, region == "california")

# Load turbine data and filter for CA
load("DATA/wind_turbines.rda")
wind_ca <- subset(wind_turbines, t_state == "CA")


# Create the map
ggplot() +
  # Draw California
  geom_polygon(data = california, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), 
               fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  # Add turbine points using the correct column names from your console
  geom_point(data = wind_ca, aes(x = xlong, y = ylat), 
             color = "red", alpha = 0.5) +
  # Formatting as required by the assignment
  guides(fill = "none") +
  labs(x = "long", y = "lat") +
  coord_fixed(1.3)
```
